sections.paragraph: m. plur. pr. trunks, logs, blocks, such as are rolled, whence the name (see גָּלַל ), hence in derision idols, Levit. 26:30 Deu 29:16, etc; in various phrases; הָלַךְ אַחֲרֵי הַגִּלּוּלִים to follow idols, 1Ki 21:26, עָבַד הַגִּלּוּלִים to serve idols, 2Ki 17:12 21:21 נָשָׂא עֵינַיִם אֶל־הג׳ to lift up the eyes to idols, Eze 18:12. It is often joined to other nouns expressing contempt of idols, as שִׁקּוּצִים Deu 29:17 תֹּועֵבֹות Eze 16:36 אֱלִילִים 30:13 , and is mostly used in speeches in which worshippers of idols are rebuked, as נִטְמָא בְגִלּוּלִים to pollute oneself with idols, Eze 20:7, זָנָה אַחֲרֵי גּלּוּלִים 6:9 נִאֵף אֶת־הגִלּוּלִים 23:37 , etc.
